Body.Content:
Shared display mode in Teams is now available in government CCC-H and DoD environments, enabling more seamless and private meeting hosting from your PC. Additionally, peripheral detection for bring-your-own-device spaces is available for inventory management and reporting through the Teams Rooms Pro Management portal.

GA date: March CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft Teams: Teams shared display mode and peripheral detection available for GCC-H and DoD environments
